content: LangGraph persistence uses two layers: (1) AsyncPostgresSaver (checkpointer) for thread-scoped conversation continuity - persists graph state per thread_id; (2) PostgresStore for cross-thread long-term memory (user preferences, facts). Both from langgraph-checkpoint-postgres (latest v3.1.0 as of May 2026). Setup: from langgraph.checkpoint.postgres.aio import AsyncPostgresSaver; async with AsyncPostgresSaver.from_conn_string(SUPABASE_DB_URL) as checkpointer: await checkpointer.setup(); graph = builder.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer). Must call .setup() once. When invoking graph: config={'configurable': {'thread_id': session_id}}. For anonymous users: user_id = config['configurable'].get('user_id', 'anonymous'). Connection: use autocommit=True, row_factory=dict_row. Use Supabase pooler URL (port 6543) not direct (port 5432) for serverless. Existing langgraph 0.2.45 in the codebase is outdated vs this package - version upgrade needed.
